name: Super Runner 3d Game
description: Super Runner 3d is a 3D running game. Take control of your stickman and race against the crowd. You can run, dash or jump from rooftop to rooftop! Run over the glowing speed bumpers to gain momentum and do vaults and flips to show off your style. There are daily challenges, power-ups, and even glamorous accessories for you to create a stickman that looks like no other. Take your running game to next level with Parkour Race!
instructions: Use A D or Left and Arrow Keys to Move
